narrative.headline: What 2021 Ram 1500 owners report most
narrative.summary: Engine complaints make up the largest share of owner reports, with stalling being the most-cited symptom, including incidents occurring while the vehicle was in motion. Electrical system and power train complaints share a notable pattern of vehicles reportedly moving on their own after being parked and shut off, with some reports associated with fires or crashes. Service brake complaints describe unexpected brake engagement accompanied by unusual sounds while driving downhill.

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report the engine stalling unexpectedly while the vehicle is being driven, including while stopped at intersections. · 2 fire · 1 crash · 6 injured

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle moving on its own after being parked and the engine shut off, with some incidents associated with fire. · 3 fire · 2 crash · 4 injured
